purpose: Book of Needs source governance and tradition-coverage gap inventory.
principle: Do not manufacture tradition-specific prayers to fill taxonomy counts. Tradition-specific Book of Needs entries must be received, sourced, source-reviewed, and tradition-honest.

ANG.label: The Episcopal Church
ANG.notes: BCP-derived and Anglican/Episcopal-tagged prayers are present.

LC.label: Latin Catholic
LC.notes: Latin Catholic devotional prayers are present; Liturgy of the Hours remains pending and is not public-facing.

EO.label: Eastern Orthodoxy
EO.notes: Orthodox minister/devotional prayers are present. The Jesus Prayer and the Trisagion Prayers are included as widely received Eastern Orthodox lay-devotional prayers, with the Ancient Faith Prayer Book used as a source witness rather than a bulk-ingestion source.

OO.label: Oriental Orthodoxy
OO.notes: Four Armenian Apostolic prayers added from St. Gregory Armenian Church, Common Prayers of the Armenian Church (stgregorywp.com/prayers/), sourced from the Book of Hourly Prayers of the Armenian Apostolic Church and St. Nerses the Graceful. Do not add invented Oriental Orthodox prayers.

COE.label: Church of the East
COE.notes: Four prayers added from The Beginner's Prayerbook, Assyrian Church of the East Diocese of California, Second Revised Edition, 2019, 'Prayers for Various Occasions.' Do not add invented Church of the East prayers.

OO.basis: Shared patristic/received Christian thanksgiving prayer attributed to St. Basil; currently allowed to overlap EO and OO.
Book of Hourly Prayers of the Armenian Apostolic Church — Sixth Hour Service; via St. Gregory Armenian Church, Common Prayers of the Armenian Church (stgregorywp.com/prayers/).
St. Nerses the Graceful, "I Confess with Faith"; via St. Gregory Armenian Church, Common Prayers of the Armenian Church (stgregorywp.com/prayers/).
Book of Hourly Prayers of the Armenian Apostolic Church — Sunrise Service; via St. Gregory Armenian Church, Common Prayers of the Armenian Church (stgregorywp.com/prayers/).
St. Nerses the Graceful, "I Confess with Faith"; via St. Gregory Armenian Church, Common Prayers of the Armenian Church (stgregorywp.com/prayers/).

COE.basis: The Beginner's Prayerbook, Assyrian Church of the East Diocese of California, Second Revised Edition, 2019, 'Prayers for Various Occasions.' https://acoecalifornia.org/files/The-Beginners-Prayer-Book-Text---version-3-1.pdf

The Beginner's Prayerbook, Assyrian Church of the East Diocese of California, Second Revised Edition, 2019, 'Prayers for Various Occasions.' https://acoecalifornia.org/files/The-Beginners-Prayer-Book-Text---version-3-1.pdf

The Beginner's Prayerbook, Assyrian Church of the East Diocese of California, Second Revised Edition, 2019, 'Prayers for Various Occasions.' https://acoecalifornia.org/files/The-Beginners-Prayer-Book-Text---version-3-1.pdf

The Beginner's Prayerbook, Assyrian Church of the East Diocese of California, Second Revised Edition, 2019, 'Prayers for Various Occasions.' https://acoecalifornia.org/files/The-Beginners-Prayer-Book-Text---version-3-1.pdf

forbiddenSourcePhrasesForTraditionSpecif: Universal Office original pastoral text for Oriental Orthodox use
Universal Office original pastoral text for Church of the East use
Universal Office original pastoral text for OO use
Universal Office original pastoral text for COE use
futureAdditionRequirements: Add the prayer text to data/prayers.json only with source/provenance recorded.
Add the UI option only after source/provenance has been reviewed.
Add the tradition assignment only after determining whether the prayer is received/traditional, adapted, translated, source-reviewed, or original.
If original pastoral material is intentionally added, keep it in a separate Universal Office original category rather than silently treating it as tradition-specific OO or COE material.
Update this governance inventory when real OO or COE prayers are added.
